channel.title: Open Graph Markup - Yoast SEO + REST API - Head Tags plugin
channel.description: I use REST API - Head Tags plugin, and Yoast SEO. On my Wordpress Site posts has all the needed Open Graph Markup for Facebook Share, but my frontity site head does not contains these. Is it not yet supported?

item.title: Open Graph Markup - Yoast SEO + REST API - Head Tags plugin
item.dc:creator: koli14
item.description:
Sorry, I just needed to clean the Cache of the plugin, as described in the docs.

Read full topic
item.source: Open Graph Markup - Yoast SEO + REST API - Head Tags plugin
